case_title: PATRICIA S. LAMASTUS VS. WALGREEN CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY LAMASTUS, PATRICIA S. AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-24-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMASTUS, PATRICIA S. AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMASTUS, PATRICIA S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT TOOK REASONABLE STEPS TO ASSURE THAT PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE HER MEDICATION PENDING MEDICAL APPROVAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMASTUS, PATRICIA S. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
